item.description: Build a stunning rotating shoe rack that stores dozens of pairs in a fraction of the floor space with these complete woodworking plans - a multi-tier spinning shoe rack design built around a heavy-duty Lazy Susan bearing for smooth, effortless rotation. This diy shoe organizer project transforms any walk-in closet, bedroom corner, or entryway into a boutique-style shoe display stand. The shoe carousel diy format means every pair is visible and accessible with a single spin - no more digging through piles or losing shoes at the back of a shelf. A true custom closet diy centerpiece that looks like it cost ten times what it did. The shoe tower plans are drawn for standard dimensional lumber with no specialist tools required. The circular shelf construction method is fully explained with 3D diagrams, making this one of the most approachable diy shoe rack projects in this format. If you own a CNC machine, the shoe cabinet dxf files and rotating shoe rack for cnc cutting paths are included for precision shelf circles with zero freehand cutting required. The wood shoe shelf tiers are fully customizable in height - adjust spacing to accommodate boots, heels, sneakers, or flat sandals. The shoe rack revolving mechanism uses a standard Lazy Susan bearing available at any hardware store, keeping build costs predictable and the finished result remarkably smooth. Looking to expand your closet organization beyond shoes? The same spinning base design adapts naturally into a shoe closet plans for garage setup, a boot rack plans build for an entryway mudroom, or a shoe cubby plans layout with fixed shelves on one side and rotating access on the other. The sanding paper storage shelf format in the bonus section of the plans works as a companion wall-mounted unit for any workshop or utility closet adjacent to your shoe storage area. The shoe storage dxf package and shoe rack plans diy documentation are both included - full imperial measurements, 3D assembly diagrams, a complete materials list, and a precise cut list to minimize waste and keep your build on budget. item.title: DIY Lean-To Greenhouse Plans | Wood Patio Garden Glasshouse Blueprint (PDF Download)
item.description: Build a beautiful lean-to greenhouse that attaches directly to an existing wall or fence with these complete diy greenhouse woodworking plans - a wood polycarbonate greenhouse design perfect for patios, balconies, and garden walls where space is limited but growing ambitions aren't. This lean to greenhouse plan is purpose-built for year-round growing. The sturdy wooden frame accommodates clear polycarbonate or glass panels, creating the perfect microclimate for seedlings, herbs, tropical plants, and cold-sensitive crops. Use it as a cold frame garden plan extension for your existing beds, a compact walk in greenhouse for daily tending, or a wooden greenhouse for balcony spaces that need both function and style. The greenhouse blueprint covers the complete build sequence - wall framing, roof assembly, door installation, and panel fitting - with 3D illustrations at every key stage. Whether you're after greenhouse plans for porch and patio areas or a backyard greenhouse that blends into your garden aesthetic, this lean-to structure delivers a result that looks far more architectural than any plastic kit. The garden greenhouse design works equally well as an indoor greenhouse extension off a kitchen or utility room wall, a solarium greenhouse entrance feature, or a corner greenhouse attached to two walls for maximum growing space. The diy garden shed crowd will recognize the framing method - standard dimensional lumber, straightforward joinery, no specialist tools. Looking to expand later? The same structural approach scales up into large greenhouse cedar plans or adapts into a greenhouse and shed combo diy build with minor modifications to the footprint. The glasshouse plans section includes alternative glazing layouts for both glass and polycarbonate panel systems. The greenhouse pdf package includes both imperial and metric measurements - a full glass greenhouse blueprints style documentation set with high-resolution printable sheets for workshop use. GREENHOUSE DIMENSIONS: Overall Width: 148 inches Overall Depth: 52 3/16 inches Overall Height: 96 1/8 inches WHAT'S INCLUDED: Step-by-step instructions with 3D illustrations Complete materials and lumber list Precise cut list Assembly tips for framing, roofing, door and panel installation Imperial and metric measurements ️ Digital plans only - no physical greenhouse, panels, lumber, or hardware shipped. Please follow local building codes and use proper safety equipment. - DIGITAL DOWNLOAD ONLY - PDF delivered instantly to your Etsy account after purchase.

Two smooth-gliding drawers keep hardware dust-free and within reach, while the reinforced lower shelf handles power tools, lumber stacks, or toolboxes without flexing. Add a miter saw rack to the side and you've got a complete shop table work plans solution in one build. The 65 cm (25.5 in) pegboard backing turns your wall into an organized tool station - wrenches, screwdrivers, chisels, and measuring tools all visible and instantly accessible. No more digging through drawers mid-project. Rigid workbench plans like these are built for permanence. Reinforced joinery and a strong wooden frame mean this bench stands up to years of heavy use - far more durable than modular workbenches or flat-pack alternatives. If you've been searching for saw stand table plans that double as a full workstation, this is the build. item.title: 8x10 Firewood Shed Plans: DIY Sloped Roof Woodshed (PDF Download)
item.description: Stop Burning Wet Wood! Build Your Dream Woodshed Today! Tired of struggling with soggy, smoking logs? Our 8x10 Firewood Shed Plans are the perfect solution to keep your wood dry, seasoned, and ready for the fire pit or stove. This isn't just a shed; it's the ultimate DIY project to enhance your backyard and ensure perfectly seasoned fuel all winter long! About These 8x10Wood Shed Plans These are complete DIY plans to build a sturdy, attractive 8x10 Firewood Storage Shed (or Woodshed) with an approximate 2 Cord Wood capacity. The design features a classic Sloped Roof (or Lean-To style) and open-slat sides for maximum ventilation, ensuring your firewood seasons quickly and stays perfectly dry. Key Dimensions (Based on Plan): Width: 8'-0" Depth: 10'-0" Front Height (High Side): 7'-8" Back Height (Low Side): 6'-3" What makes these plans perfect for you? Optimal Seasoning: The steeply Sloped Roof (ideal for Tin or shingle roofing) and the slatted sides promote excellent airflow, guaranteeing your wood is perfectly dried and ready to burn. Ideal Capacity: The 8x10 Firewood Shelter footprint is compact yet spacious, holding roughly 2 Cord Wood-enough to keep you warm through the cold months. Simple DIY: Designed for the beginner to intermediate builder. Our plans make this a satisfying weekend project you'll be proud of. Classic Design: A beautiful and sturdy Wood Shed Design that looks great in any backyard or homestead setting. What You Get with Your Purchase (Instant Digital PDF Download) Your purchase is an instant digital download. No physical shed or materials will be shipped. You will receive a high-quality PDF featuring: Detailed 3D Illustrations: Clear, easy-to-follow, step-by-step visuals for every stage of the build. Complete Material List: A full list of lumber, hardware (screws, nails, etc.), and roofing material (e.g., Wood Shed Tin). Precise Cut List: Accurately measured cuts for all components to minimize waste and save you time. Essential Building Tips: Helpful advice for framing, foundation, and installing the Sloped Roof. Ready to stop buying expensive, pre-built racks and create your own professional-grade firewood storage? Click 'Add to Cart' and get your instant Wood Shed Plans today! Happy building!

item.title: Costco New Year Party Printables | Editable Food Court Decor (Digital Download)
item.description: Get Ready to Wholesale Joy! Costco-Themed New Year Printables Looking for a fun, creative, and instantly recognizable theme for your next New Year celebration? Our Costco Wholesale Club New Year Printables are the perfect solution! Transform your trunk or party space into a mini warehouse full of New Year cheer, festive decorations, and everyone's favorite bulk goodies. What Makes Our Printables a "Wholesale" Hit? This comprehensive, editable digital download pack gives you everything you need to create a spectacular, on-brand Costco-themed New Year display. Forget plain decorations - this is New Year, bulk-style! Easy to Customize: You'll receive editable Canva templates that allow you to quickly change text - perfect for personalizing signs, price tags, or fun messages like "Happy 2025!" Ready-to-Print Convenience: Includes both editable Canva files and ready-to-print PDFs for instant setup. Just download, print, and decorate! Versatile Sizing: All files come in two popular printing sizes: 8.5x11 inches (standard letter) 11x17 inches (ledger/tabloid) Print Anywhere: Print easily at home or at your favorite print shop (Staples, Office Depot, or FedEx Office). The Ultimate Costco New Year Trunk Kit Includes: Create a high-quality, festive setup inspired by the beloved warehouse club: "HAPPY NEW YEAR" Signage - Perfect for your trunk or backdrop. "WELCOME 2025" Signage - Start the year in true Costco style. Costco-Style Store Hours Sign - Add realistic warehouse details. Iconic Food Court Sign - Showcase your snacks and drinks area. "KIRKLAND SIGNATURE TREATS" Aisle Signage - A fun nod to Costco's signature brand. Entrance & Exit Signs - Guide your guests in and out of the fun. Restroom Signage - A helpful, realistic touch for any event space. Price Signs - Including a festive "FREE" sign for your goodies! "10 BONUS" & "All In One" Graphic Accents - Add extra sparkle to your display. How It Works: Purchase & Download: Complete your order and receive your files instantly. Edit (Optional): Open in Canva to customize names, dates, or slogans. Print: Use the PDF or edited version at home or any print shop. Decorate: Set up your trunk or wall display - and get ready for all the smiles and photos! Transform your space into a mini Costco New Year celebration! Download, customize, and print your way to the most memorable and cheerful event of the year.
